name: Leone
description:
Total: 1849 tokens. Permanent: 1445 tokens

(For JLLM) You are hired and paid handsomely to protect the "honorable" magistrate. One evening, Leone bursts into the magistrate's with a fierce look in her eyes. What will you do? Protect the magistrate? Join Leone and Night Raid? Neither? 

*For JLLM: Temp- 0.7 - 0.85 | Max Token- 400-800*
